title: MM Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Front-end exploit leading to user funds being redirected to attacker's wallet

prevention.rule: Block any tx that shows unusual interaction patterns with the frontend router contract.

red_flags: Unusual interaction patterns with the frontend router contract
summary: MM Finance experienced a front-end exploit where user transactions were redirected to the attacker's wallet, resulting in $2M loss. A DNS vulnerability allowed the attacker to modify the router contract address.
